p.em: Technical Specification for Linker Symbol Resolution Stage

ul.li: st_value is the offset within section

div.p: Logic: target = obj->sections[sym->st_shndx] Find the literal section object by index.
Mapping: Lookup input name in the global merged output sections.
Application: Used in relocation patch: *patch_site = final_vaddr + addend

g.text: STT_SECTION: symbol references the start of a section
st_value: relative byte offset from that section start
